summary: Added startWindDown() function to LPVault.sol — Oracle-gated, one-way phase transition from Active (1) to WindDown (2). Emits VaultWindDownStarted(marketId). The existing phase guard on mintPositionFor (if phase != 1 revert VaultNotActive) automatically blocks mints in WindDown. collect and reclaimDeposit have no phase check and remain callable. 15 integration tests cover all 6 scenarios.
